scripts.sync:sitemap: PORTFOLIO_MODE=directing node scripts/generate-sitemap.mjs && PORTFOLIO_MODE=postproduction node scripts/generate-sitemap.mjs
scripts.sync:robots: PORTFOLIO_MODE=directing node scripts/generate-robots.mjs && PORTFOLIO_MODE=postproduction node scripts/generate-robots.mjs
scripts.sync:all: npm run sync:data && npm run sync:sitemap && npm run sync:robots
